pillars.title: Privacy-Preserving Health Records

pillars.summary: Cross-ministry integration of health verification with citizenship and engagement pathways.

pillars.title: Pharmaceutical Supply Integrity
pillars.summary: End-to-end ledger tracking for medication authenticity, cold-chain monitoring, and recall management.
